---
title: "setup.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/setup.test.ts"
loc: 80
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.83
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 8.40
overall_score: 5.63
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [mock](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [executeGenesisSequence](file://../../src/node/setup.js)
- [getVenvBinaryPath](file://../../src/node/setup.js)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `pipPath`
- `pipPath`
- `mockExecFunction`
- `mockFs`
- `originalCi`
- `originalSkipLink`
- `pipCallArgs`
- `pipCallArgs`
